meta.title: Varto Çekici | 24/7 Towing & Roadside Assistance — Muş Varto
meta.description: 24/7 towing and roadside assistance in Varto, Hınıs, Muş and surrounding regions of Eastern Turkey. Call now: +90 553 181 57 91. City, intercity, off-road, battery, tire, fuel and lockout services.
meta.keywords: Varto towing, Muş towing, Varto roadside assistance, Hınıs tow truck, Varto auto recovery, 24/7 towing Muş, off road recovery Varto, Erzurum Muş highway towing

hero.title: Stranded on the Road? One Call Away.
hero.subtitle: 24/7 towing and auto recovery across Varto, Hınıs, Muş and the surrounding region. City, intercity, off-road — wherever you are, we'll come.

services.title: Ready for Anything You'll Face on the Road
services.subtitle: One phone call, day or night, snow or shine — we are on our way.

tow.title: City & Intercity Towing
tow.description: We tow your broken-down or accident vehicle safely and quickly to any destination you choose.

offroad.title: Off-Road & Field Recovery
offroad.description: Stuck in snow, mud, a steep slope, or off the road? Our specialized equipment gets your vehicle out.

battery.title: Battery Boost
battery.description: Dead battery? We jumpstart your vehicle on the spot so you can get back on the road.

tire.title: Tire Change & Repair
tire.description: Flat or low tire — we come to your location and get you rolling again.

fuel.title: Fuel Delivery
fuel.description: Out of fuel? We bring you fuel from the nearest station.

lockout.title: Lockout & Key Service
lockout.description: Lost your key or locked it inside the car? We provide professional assistance.

accident.title: Post-Accident Towing
accident.description: After an accident, we transport your vehicle to a service center or any location you choose.

heavy.title: Every Vehicle Type
heavy.description: Sedan, SUV, pickup, light commercial — towing service for all vehicle types.

area.title: Based in Varto, Covering the Whole Region
area.subtitle: Our primary service area is Varto, but we reach across the entire Muş province and surrounding districts. If you're in any of the regions listed below, don't hesitate to call.
area.callout: Not on the list? Call us anyway — chances are we can still reach you.

about.title: We Don't Leave You Stranded
about.subtitle: Local crew, fast response, honest pricing.

local.title: Local Crew
local.description: We know Varto and the surrounding region inside out. We reach you via the shortest route, fast.

fast.title: Fast Response
fast.description: The moment you call, our team is moving. Every minute counts when you're stranded.

honest.title: Honest Pricing
honest.description: We tell you the distance and the price on the phone. No surprises later.

ready.title: Any Weather, Any Time
ready.description: Snow, rain, night, holiday — it doesn't matter. We are at your service 24/7.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: In an emergency, call directly. For general questions, WhatsApp or email us.

body.heading: Data Controller
body.text: This notice has been prepared by Varto Çekici Oto Kurtarma (the "Business") under Turkish Personal Data Protection Law No. 6698 ("KVKK").

body.heading: Personal Data Processed
body.text: When you visit our site, your IP address and browser information may be collected automatically for technical reasons. When you contact us via phone or WhatsApp, your name, phone number, vehicle and location details are processed solely to provide you with service.

body.heading: Purposes of Processing
body.text: Your data is processed to deliver towing and roadside assistance services, to communicate with customers, to improve service quality, and to fulfill legal obligations.

body.heading: Data Sharing
body.text: Your personal data is not shared with third parties without your explicit consent, except for lawful requests from public authorities.

body.heading: Your Rights
body.text: Under Article 11 of KVKK, you have the right to access, correct, delete, or restrict the processing of your data. Requests can be sent to vartocekici@gmail.com.

body.heading: What Are Cookies?
body.text: Cookies are small text files placed in your browser by the websites you visit. They help the site work better and allow your visit to be analyzed.

body.heading: Cookies We Use
body.text: We only use essential functional cookies along with anonymous measurement cookies from Vercel Analytics and Vercel Speed Insights, which do not contain personal identifiers.

body.heading: Third-Party Cookies
body.text: Vercel infrastructure cookies may be used for measurement and performance data. This data cannot be linked to identifiable individuals.

body.heading: Your Cookie Choices
body.text: You can delete or block cookies in your browser settings. Disabling some cookies may cause certain features of the site to malfunction.

body.heading: Contact
body.text: For questions about our cookie policy, please contact vartocekici@gmail.com.
